name: Seattle MortgageRight - Steve Konwent
description_short: MortgageRight Seattle is a direct mortgage lender offering home purchase, refinance, and construction loans with competitive rates and no points or hidden fees.
description_long:
MortgageRight is a mortgage lending company operating nationwide with a dedicated Seattle location. The company is represented by loan officer Steven Konwent and emphasizes direct lending relationships that eliminate intermediaries in the mortgage process. Founded on the principle of making mortgages accessible and straightforward, MortgageRight positions itself as a friction-reducer in homeownership, particularly for first-time buyers and those seeking refinancing options.

The company offers three primary mortgage products: new home purchase loans, refinancing options, and construction/building loans for custom homes. Borrowers can lock in rates advertised as low, with the company explicitly highlighting "no points" and "no hidden fees" as core differentiators. The application process is digital and structured in three steps: selecting a loan officer (Steven Konwent), creating a verified account on their Ellie Mae-powered platform, and submitting the full application. The website also provides educational resources including a First-Time Homebuyer Guide, Moving Tips Kit, and Credit Repair Kit to support customers throughout the process.

MortgageRight distinguishes itself through direct lending, hands-on assistance from experienced professionals, and removal of what they describe as "speed bumps" in the mortgage process. The company operates multiple locations nationwide and emphasizes cutting out middlemen to deliver faster turnaround and lower costs. Their application platform integrates with Ellie Mae, a widely-used industry standard for mortgage processing. Contact options include phone (253-921-4323 and 205-776-8401) and email (Stevenk@MortgageRight.com and Contact@MortgageRight.com).

As a mortgage lender, MortgageRight serves borrowers seeking traditional home financing. The website content is relatively light on specific product details, loan terms, rate examples, or detailed fee structures. No information is provided about loan types (FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo), credit requirements, or current APR ranges. The company's marketing emphasizes simplicity and low rates but provides limited concrete product specifications typical of established lenders.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Direct lending model cuts out intermediaries, potentially reducing costs and speeding up loan processing
Explicitly advertises no points and no hidden fees, providing pricing transparency
Hands-on assistance from experienced loan officers including Steven Konwent
Digital application platform powered by Ellie Mae, a standard industry-leading system
Multiple locations nationwide with local Seattle branch service
Educational resources provided (First-Time Homebuyer Guide, Moving Tips Kit, Credit Repair Kit)
Covers multiple mortgage products: purchase, refinance, and construction loans
cons: Website lacks specific loan product details (FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo options not listed)
No rate examples, APR ranges, or current promotional rates disclosed for comparison
Limited information about credit requirements, debt-to-income limits, or qualification criteria
No customer reviews, testimonials, or third-party ratings visible on the website
Contact information shows two different phone numbers and email addresses without clear differentiation
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking hands-on guidance and educational support
Homeowners looking to refinance existing mortgages with a direct lender
Borrowers building custom homes who need construction/building loans
diagnosis: MortgageRight Seattle is best suited for borrowers seeking a streamlined, direct-lending mortgage experience with personalized assistance from loan officer Steven Konwent. The main caveat is that the website provides limited specifics on loan products, current rates, fees, and qualification criteria—interested borrowers will need to contact the company directly or submit an application to receive detailed pricing and product information.
services: Digital loan application via Ellie Mae platform
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
